addressed: Upgraded apispec pin from <6.7.0 to <7.0.0, bumping installed version from 6.6.1 to 6.10.0. Updated integration test assertions to match corrected JSON-schema output for bare Dict() fields.
structured_output.reasoning: The apispec pin existed because version 6.7.0 fixed issue #949 (adding additionalProperties: {} to bare Dict fields), which broke test assertions in api_tests.py. The fix is straightforward: the new schema output is semantically more correct (an unconstrained dict should explicitly declare additionalProperties), so we bump the pin and update the two affected test assertions (BigQuery query field and GSheets catalog field) to expect the corrected output. Pre-commit checks pass. No functionality is affected — only the OpenAPI schema documentation becomes more precise.
